pi_items.source: Matches setup_task.sh and task description - configuration parameter
Mathematical calculation: π × 30² × 5 - π × 19.05² × 5 - 4 × π × 2.75² × 5 = 7961.54 mm³, verified through Python computation
Configuration parameter for tolerance (±15%), reasonable for CAD tolerances
NEMA 23 stepper motor standard flange diameter: 2.3×2.3 inches (58.4-60 mm). Web search confirmed 60mm is standard approximation. Verified against NEMA 23 specifications.
NEMA 23 stepper motor standard flange diameter: 2.3×2.3 inches (58.4-60 mm). Same as bbox_x.
Specified in task description as 'Flange Thickness: 5 mm'. Verified in volume calculation.
Configuration parameter for bounding box tolerance (±3mm), reasonable for manufacturing tolerances
Matches the workflow steps in task description and verifier.py which explicitly checks for these three FreeCAD Part Design features

privileged_info_summary: The create_polar_pattern task specifies creating a NEMA 23 stepper motor mounting flange using standard industry dimensions. All metadata values are verified: the expected volume of 7960.0 mm³ matches the calculated volume (7961.54 mm³) from the specified geometry (60mm diameter, 5mm thickness, 38.1mm center hole, 5.5mm bolt holes, 4 holes total). The bounding box dimensions (60×60×5 mm) correspond to standard NEMA 23 flange specifications (2.3×2.3 inches ≈ 60mm). The required features (Pad, Pocket, PolarPattern) match the specified FreeCAD Part Design workflow. All tolerances are reasonable and consistent with CAD/manufacturing standards. The geometry specifications are based on real NEMA 23 stepper motor standards documented in engineering references.
